Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement And General Mutual Release; To Approve Resignation Of Trustee; And To Approve Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John O'Connor for John Bajalia (Petitioner).
Chris Dewys for Joy Bajalia (Respondent).

Mr. O'Connor stated that he has a declaration from his Client, that they have secured a bond, that the declaration has not been e-filed, and that it addresses the rental income and the property on hand, but not the real property at this time. Mr. Dewys stated that the declaration makes reference to a pending hegstad petition in San Mateo for $650,000.00 that is being litigated to have it as a trust asset. Mr. O'Connor stated that they can petition to increase bond if that happens. The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement and General Release, etc. is under submission pending filing of the bond and filing of said declaration. Mr. O'Connor is to provide courtesy copies of said documents reflecting the electronically filed stamp to the Probate Examiner's attention.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee; And For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Aug-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Barulich for John Bajalia.
Chris Dewys for Joy Bajalia.

Mr. Barulich stated that they have successfully resolved the matter, that they have a signed settlement agreement, that a petition for approval will be filed today, that they have consents and that one consent is in transit. The Court Clerk explained that todays matter will be continued for two weeks and then continued to what ever date is given the to petition for approval. Counsel asked to have the petition for approval of the settlement agreement heard on shortened time and expressed concern about not having a Trustee in place. The Court informed Counsel that they can file an ex parte petition to appoint a Temporary Trustee. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to August 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chris DeWys for Joy Bajalia (Respondent)
John O'Connor for John Bajalia (Petitioner)

Mr. O'Connor stated that they are drafting a settlement agreement as of late Friday, request a 30 day continuance to submit a petition to approve settlement, and that it is alright with respondent to appoint John Bajalia as Trustee as part of the settlement agreement.
The Order to Show Cause is Off Calendar. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to August 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing petition to approve settlement.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee; And For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Continued To Aug-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee; And For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Barulich for and with John Bajalia.
Chris Dewys for Joy Bajalia (Objector).
Rhonda Ivory (Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Dewys stated that he filed a response on Friday and served it. Mr. Barulich stated that he received a declaration, that last nights declaration is inconsistent, that at the last hearing they did not have a Trustee and that the Trustee was suspended. Mr. Barulich also stated that the Trustee does not know the value of the accounts, that he would like to conduct discovery, set a hearing and asked the Court to sua sponte appoint his Client. Mr. Dewys indicated that he is willing to do mediation. Mr. Barulich stated that he would do mediation after they do discovery. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. is continued to June 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of the response/declaration and for Mr. Barulich to file a response. Mr. Barulich is to file his response by June 15, 2018. The Trustee is to be present.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee; And For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Barulich for and with John Bajalia

The Court noted that the declaration filed by the attorney is missing verification from the client, and questions whether notice was given to Nicole Farmer. Mr. Barulich stated that he has not filed a verification, notice was given to Nicole Farmer (copy of Notice of Hearing presented), he has had no contact with the Respondent, and he has done everything they could to put the Trustee on notice. The Court notes that the proof of service indicates notice to Nicole was in care of John Bajalia and stated that Nicole needs to receive direct notice. Mr. Bajalia stated that Nicole is living between addresses and notice was delivered to him, and he delivered it to her. The Court directed Counsel to file a declaration and stated that it is going to suspend the Trustee. Mr. Barulich requested that his client be appointed Successor Trustee during the time of the suspension, made reference to the manner in which the Trust was drafted, and stated that there is no indication of succession Trustee. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file an ex parte petition for appointment of his client as Temporary Trustee. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause re: Removal of Joy Bajalia, Trustee, with a hearing set for May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will also issue an order suspending Joy Bajalia as Trustee. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is also continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee; And For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Continued To Apr-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
